title: ChannelData
description: `channel add|remove <channel> <skill>...` — place / remove skill references in a channel. **INFERRED.**

applied.description: `true` on the `--yes` apply, `false` on the describe.

creates.description: `true` when this `add` would CREATE the channel (it does not exist yet).

mode.description: The channel's mode (`open` / `curated`) — the gate a placement passes.

detail.description: The refusal detail when `failed` (e.g. a curated-channel role refusal).

outcome.description:
`pending` (describe), `placed` / `removed` (applied ok), or `failed` (a mid-flight refusal after
an earlier one landed — reported honestly, per skill).

ChannelItemOutcome.description: One skill's channel-op outcome. **INFERRED value set.**
